title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Evergreen India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Evergreen India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Evergreen India family as a Distribution Manager in Jodhpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Evergreen India:
Evergreen India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Evergreen India!
